summary: Frontend testing completed for invoice design and contact page features. All 7 test cases PASSED successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice design and contact page features are fully functional. All requested features have been implemented correctly.

test_1_pos_add_product_and_preview.description: POS page - Add product to cart and view invoice preview
test_1_pos_add_product_and_preview.evidence: Successfully selected table 1, added 'برغر كلاسيك' product to cart (12,000 IQD), and opened invoice preview dialog

test_2_invoice_restaurant_logo.description: Invoice - Restaurant logo appears at top
test_2_invoice_restaurant_logo.evidence: Restaurant logo (Unsplash image) is displayed at the top of the invoice preview. Logo is configured in Settings > Invoice Settings

test_3_invoice_phone_and_address.description: Invoice - Phone numbers and address displayed
test_3_invoice_phone_and_address.evidence: Invoice shows: Address 'بغداد - شارع المتنبي', Phone numbers '07701234567 - 07809876543' with phone icon

test_4_invoice_table_and_cashier.description: Invoice - Table number and cashier name displayed
test_4_invoice_table_and_cashier.evidence: Invoice shows: 'طاولة: 1' (Table: 1), 'الكاشير: مدير النظام (مدير)' (Cashier: System Admin (Manager))

test_5_invoice_english_date_time_numbers.description: Invoice - Date, time and numbers in English format
test_5_invoice_english_date_time_numbers.evidence: Invoice displays '2/17/2026 - 02:31 PM' in English format. All numbers (prices, quantities) are in English numerals

test_6_contact_page_buttons.description: Contact page - Call and WhatsApp buttons
test_6_contact_page_buttons.evidence: Contact page (/contact) shows: 2 'اتصال' (Call) buttons in blue, 2 'واتساب' (WhatsApp) buttons in green, 1 'إرسال بريد إلكتروني' (Send Email) button in red. Phone numbers: 07701234567, 07809876543. Email: info@maestroegp.com

test_7_contact_page_language_change.description: Contact page - Language change button works
test_7_contact_page_language_change.evidence: Language button in top-left corner works correctly. Clicking 'العربية' opens language menu, selecting 'English' changes page to English: 'Call', 'WhatsApp', 'Send Email' buttons, 'Contact us to get your copy' title, 'All Rights Reserved' footer
